meta.title: PACE RISE | Sports Technology – Track & Field Systems
meta.description:
PACE RISE prioritizes the qualitative growth
of Korean track & field
and the advancement of athlete performance.
We set new standards through the Wavelight LED pacing system
and our Competition Operating System (COS), PACE RISE : Node.

hero.description:
A technological bridge connecting
the precision of elite athletics
with the passion of amateur sports.
PACE RISE empowers every athlete
with tools to exceed their potential.

home.services_desc:
Innovating every moment in track & field
with technology.
From the light on the track
to competition management.
home.service_pacing_light_desc:
LED pacing lights run along the track,
visually guiding athletes to their target pace.
We bring the Wavelight technology —
proven at the World Athletics Diamond League —
to Korean tracks.
home.service_pacing_light_feature_visual:
Distance-specific target pace settings
with color-coded lap times
home.service_pacing_light_feature_diamond:
Technology officially adopted by
World Athletics Diamond League
home.service_pacing_light_feature_all_level:
Supporting athletes of all levels,
from elite to amateur
home.service_cos_desc:
From tournament creation to finals —
all competition workflows in one system.
Integrated real-time record entry,
document output, scoreboard integration,
and broadcast overlay support.
home.service_cos_feature_workflow:
Tournament creation → Event setup →
Athlete registration → Heat assignment →
Record entry → Finals
home.service_cos_feature_realtime:
Real-time results via SSE + WebSocket —
no refresh needed
home.service_cos_feature_broadcast:
OBS broadcast overlay,
scoreboard integration,
HD result image generation
home.vision_desc:
Through expanding the track & field community
and democratizing technology,
we build a future where every athlete
can compete in the best environment.
home.goal_expand_desc:
Creating an environment
where more people can enjoy
and participate in track & field.
home.goal_growth_desc:
Building an ecosystem
where athletes, coaches,
and event organizers grow together.
home.goal_overcome_desc:
Helping athletes push beyond their limits
through precise data
and visual pacing.
home.goal_democratize_desc:
Bringing international-grade technology
to track & field events
at every level.

about.title: About PACE RISE
about.subtitle:
A sports technology company
leading the qualitative growth
of Korean track & field
about.mission_desc:
PACE RISE prioritizes the qualitative growth
of Korean track & field
and the improvement of athlete performance.

As a technological bridge connecting
the precision of elite athletics
with the passion of amateur sports,
we lead the digital transformation of track & field
through real-time pacing light systems
and Competition Operating System (COS) development.
about.tech_pacing_desc:
Through the Wavelight LED pacing system,
we visually guide every athlete on the track
to their target pace.
This is world-class technology
proven at the Diamond League.
about.tech_cos_desc:
Our in-house COS
(Competition Operating System)
integrates all competition workflows
into one system.
182 REST APIs, 47 real-time events,
with built-in WA rule engine.
about.target_youth_desc:
Nurturing future track & field stars
with systematic record management
and training environments.
about.target_elite_desc:
Maximizing elite athlete performance
through precise pacing
and real-time data.
about.target_masters_desc:
Bringing professional
competition management technology
to amateur track & field culture.

pacing_light.meta_title: Real-time Pacing Light System · WAVELIGHT SYSTEM
pacing_light.meta_desc:
Wavelight LED pacing system
visually guides every athlete on the track
to their target pace.
pacing_light.hero_desc:
The Wavelight LED pacing system features
LED lights installed along the inside rail of the track
that illuminate sequentially at a set pace,
providing an intuitive and immersive race experience
for both athletes and spectators alike.
pacing_light.wavelight_title: What is the Wave Light System?
pacing_light.wavelight_desc:
Wave Light consists of LED modules
installed along the inside rail of the track.
Each LED lights up sequentially
matching the target record,
appearing as if light is running along the track.
pacing_light.wavelight_desc2:
Officially adopted at major international events
including the World Athletics Diamond League,
PACE RISE brings this technology
to Korean tracks.
pacing_light.principle_1:
Set target records by distance
(800m, 1500m, 5000m, etc.)
and the system automatically calculates
the speed per lap.
pacing_light.principle_2:
LED modules along the inside rail
light up sequentially at the calculated speed,
providing visual pacing for athletes.
pacing_light.principle_3:
Multiple paces —
world records, event records, personal goals —
can be displayed simultaneously
using different colors.
pacing_light.feature_visual_pace_desc:
Athletes can instantly identify
their position relative to the target record,
directly contributing to race strategy.
pacing_light.feature_spectator_desc:
LED light movement
visually conveys race tension,
maximizing spectator immersion.
pacing_light.feature_performance_desc:
As a visual pacemaker,
it helps athletes maintain consistent lap times,
increasing the chance of record-breaking.
pacing_light.usecase_diamond_league_desc:
Precision pacing
for world record attempts
and maximizing elite performance.
pacing_light.usecase_national_desc:
Elevating competition quality
and spectator experience
at major domestic events.
pacing_light.usecase_youth_desc:
Naturally teaching young athletes
goal-awareness and race strategy.
pacing_light.usecase_masters_desc:
Providing amateur runners
with pro-level pacing experience.
pacing_light.usecase_training_desc:
Used by coaches and athletes
for precise pace control during training.
pacing_light.diamond_title: Technology Proven at the Diamond League
pacing_light.diamond_desc:
The Wavelight LED pacing system
is officially adopted at major international events
including the World Athletics Diamond League.

PACE RISE brings this record-breaking light technology
to Korean tracks.
pacing_light.cta_title: Want to Adopt the Pacing Light System?
pacing_light.cta_desc:
We'll propose the optimal solution
for your event scale and track environment.

cos.meta_title: COS · Competition Operating System · PACE RISE : Node
cos.meta_desc:
From tournament creation to finals —
all competition operations in one system.
182 REST APIs, 47 real-time events,
built-in WA rule engine.
cos.hero_desc:
From tournament creation to finals advancement —
every track & field competition workflow
unified in a single platform.

Real-time record entry,
automatic Q/q qualification,
official document output,
electronic scoreboard integration,
and live broadcast overlay —
all seamlessly connected.
cos.operator_desc:
Systematically manage
all workflows needed
for competition operations.
cos.op_workflow_desc:
Tournament creation → Event setup →
Athlete registration → Heat assignment →
Record entry → Round progression → Finals.
Supports automatic Q/q ranking
and WA seeding rules.
cos.op_record_entry_desc:
Track: time + wind, LIF file import.
Field: distance & wind, fouls/pass,
WA tie-break rules.
High jump: O/X/– input
with auto-elimination after 3 failures.
Mixed event scoring,
relay team/leg management.
cos.op_callroom_desc:
Barcode check-in,
live attendance monitoring,
per-athlete/event notes,
admin post-event access.
cos.op_documents_desc:
Start List PDF,
Result Sheet PDF (DNF/DQ/Q/q),
comprehensive record Excel/PDF,
AD Card PDF,
customizable templates
(logo, signatures, field selection).
cos.op_scoreboard_desc:
LIF file import
with event key-mapping
for electronic scoreboard integration.
Software-only operation
without additional hardware.
cos.op_broadcast_desc:
OBS scoreboard overlay,
lower-third captions,
and broadcast graphics via WebSocket
in real-time.
No separate graphics software needed.
cos.consumer_desc:
Access live competition results
from anywhere —
no page refresh required.
cos.con_realtime_sse_desc:
SSE + WebSocket-based
real-time record updates
without page refresh.
Pop-up dashboards per event
for instant detailed information.
cos.con_open_page_desc:
Authentication-free open.html page
with federation filtering
for quick record lookup.
cos.con_overlay_desc:
Connect scoreboard overlay
and lower-third captions directly to OBS.
Real-time data via WebSocket
enables broadcasting
without separate graphics equipment.
cos.con_result_image_desc:
Auto-generated high-resolution result images
(1080×1350 PNG) and Excel downloads.
Optimized for social media sharing.
cos.arch_backend_desc:
Single-server deployment
based on better-sqlite3.
Quick setup and stable operation
without complex infrastructure.
cos.arch_frontend_desc:
Lightweight, fast-loading
pure JavaScript SPA without frameworks.
PWA support
for app-like mobile experience.
cos.arch_realtime_desc:
Separate SSE broadcast for streaming
and WebSocket for scoreboards.
Optimized real-time communication
per channel.
cos.arch_security_desc:
Viewer (operation_key),
Judge/Staff (record entry),
Admin (full control, bcrypt, post-event lock).
Rate Limiting + Helmet security,
audit/operation logs, DB backup/restore.
cos.wa_rules_desc:
Wind limits, tie-breaks,
high jump failure counting,
Q/q auto-qualification,
mixed event scoring —
World Athletics (WA) rules
are built into the software
to prevent operator errors
and ensure fair competition.
cos.cta_title: Want to Adopt PACE RISE : Node?
cos.cta_desc:
We'll propose the optimal solution
for your event scale
and operational environment.

footer.description:
A sports technology company
leading the qualitative growth
of Korean track & field —
PACE RISE is with you.
